field.label: Name
field.help: Unique name for this watcher (alphanumeric + underscores, max 32 chars).

field.label: Type
field.help: DNS Hostname: resolve a FQDN to IPs. URL Table: fetch an IP list from a URL.

field.label: Hostname
field.help: FQDN to resolve (for DNS type). Example: office.example.com

field.label: URL
field.help: URL to fetch IP list from (for URL Table type). Example: https://example.com/iplist.txt

field.label: Target Alias
field.help: Name of the OPNsense firewall alias (pf table) to update. Must already exist.

field.label: Interval (seconds)
field.help: How often to check for changes. Range: 10-86400 seconds.

field.label: Address Family
field.help: For DNS type: resolve IPv4 only, IPv6 only, or both.
